headline: Assessing Tempus AI (TEM) Valuation After ALERT Cardiology Trial Results And Expanded Merck Collaboration
summary: Tempus AI (TEM) is back in focus after new data from its ALERT cardiology trial and an expanded collaboration with Merck highlighted how its AI tools are being used in real clinical workflows. See our latest analysis for Tempus AI. Despite the ALERT trial and recent pharma collaborations, Tempus AI’s share price return has been weak. A 30 day share price return of 15.08% and a year to date share price return of 27.49% point to fading momentum, while the 1 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Philip Kotler Revolutionized Marketing — And Didn't Stop There
summary: As a youngster, Philip Kotler loved books.  "When I was 12, I got into Plato and Aristotle," said Kotler, 94, who's considered the father of modern marketing.  "It could get noisy so I found a place I could read about the history of the world" in peace.
